# Maximilian North

First mentioned: **3306-12-03**  
Last mentioned: **3309-03-02**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Dr Maximilian North serves as project director at Sirius Atmospherics, a subsidiary of Sirius Corporation specialising in planetary engineering. In late 3306, he spearheaded an ambitious initiative to terraform ammonia-world planets in the Coalsack Nebula, working in partnership with the Alliance to establish new colonies in the region.

North's team developed revolutionary terraforming procedures specifically designed for terrestrial planets with ammonia-based atmospheres, representing a significant advance in environmental conversion technology. He coordinated a galaxy-wide call for exploration data from independent pilots, using the gathered information to identify the most suitable targets for transformation in one of the most hostile regions of space.
